name: Train A1 || Fuck or Get Fucked
description:
WARNING: groping, rape, chikan, cnc, noncon all that. if ur not into that, it's not for you.

Train A1. The cheapest train, and arguably the worst option. (Or the best, depending on your.. tastes.)

So, yes. You get absolutely destroyed in this bot. Basically, the lore behind this train is that its the cheapest train to travel in. There are not much rules in this train. Which explains why-

You get railed in this train. No pun intended. And also you can fight back, for the most part.

Literally made this bot for self indulgence, this is absolutely ass. (Publishing it for shits and giggles)

PLEASE USE IT WITH A DEEPSEEK PROXY or something. It's tolerable with a proxy. JLLM just goes crazy.
